task:
In LibreOffice Calc, change three user preferences so that they persist to the user profile at `~/.config/libreoffice/4/user/registrymodifications.xcu`:
- 'LibreOffice Calc > Defaults' — 'Number of worksheets in new document' = 5.
- 'Load/Save > General' — 'Always save as' for 'Spreadsheet' documents = 'Excel 2007-365 (*.xlsx)'.
- 'LibreOffice Calc > General' — 'Measurement unit' = 'Inch'.

Close LibreOffice cleanly so the preferences are flushed. Do NOT create or open any spreadsheet document — this task only changes the user's default preferences.

verification.description: Default sheet count for new workbooks = 5
Default save format for Calc is MS Excel 2007 (.xlsx)
Default measurement unit for Calc is Inch (enum value 2)
